query: soft focus dreamy hazy out of focus portrait
message: sub:intentional_blur/soft_focus — anti_aesthetic — dreamy hazy out-of-focus portraits, vaseline lens, soft veil

response.objective_caption: Overlapping circular light spots in soft pastels including peach, mint green, golden yellow, lavender, pale blue, and creamy white, floating against a dark ground with no discernible objects or figures.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An intentionally blurred abstract composition of soft pastel bokeh circles—peach, mint, gold, lavender, and pale blue—rendered without any discernible subject or fine detail, the image relinquishes representational clarity entirely to become a field of pure color and out-of-focus light, functioning as a non-representational color study.
